title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist AI system automates medical discoveries including treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. Robin is an agent system that uses consensus mechanisms to identify genetic connections and validate treatment discoveries across multiple disease areas.
